name: CONTRACT-BUG-44
title: Contract spec.md references retired build-contract.json mechanism
description: Wave 1 (rabbit-feature audit, 2026-05-23) found that .claude/features/contract/docs/spec/spec.md still names .claude/features/contract/build-contract.json in multiple invariants (current Inv 6, 19, 30, 35) even though build-contract.json was retired during the federate-build-manifests migration. The active build mechanism is per-feature publish.json. The contract spec needs cleanup of build-contract.json references and migration to publish.json semantics. Inv 30 also cites 'rabbit-feature spec Inv 4' and 'test-build-source-points-to-rabbit-feature.py'; after Wave 1 those are renumbered (Inv 1) and renamed (test-build-source.py). Contract audit wave should address all of this.

history.note: Fixed in CONTRACT-WAVE-9: spec.md Surface section reconciled with disk (build-contract.json + schema removed; meta-contract schemas + lib modules added). Inv 6/7/30/35 retired to CHANGELOG.md. Inv 19 reworded around bug.json.schema.json live source. Invariant enforcement limitations section removed.
